phone_presence_notes: Consistently upbeat and warm, offered multiple scheduling options with genuine flexibility, and closed the booking confidently without pressure.
top_strength: Clean booking execution — confirmed two schedule options, gave a clear estimate range with scenario explanation, and handled the caller's scheduling uncertainty well.
coaching_note: No differentiators landed at all — No Worries Damage Coverage, Meet Your Mover, On-Time Guarantee, and Save Your Ass were all missed. These need to be woven in before the estimate, not after booking. Customer name was never used (caller was a boyfriend, not the CRM contact — still, address by name when possible).
